since_last: 48% of 86 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.26%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.32% · BTC -2.44% · Gold -2.18% · Nasdaq100 -0.02%. 48% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.26%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.26%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.60%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -6.49%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +4.99%, ZBRA +3.45%, INTU +2.89%, WDAY +2.78%, ZS +2.52%. Laggards: SMR -6.49%, OKLO -5.79%, OKLO -5.79%, INOD -4.60%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.01% at $157.68
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.01% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
